title: Voxterra
description: Voxterra combines technology and exploration with new machines, biomes, and dungeons for a richer survival experience.
body:
# Voxterra

*Where industry meets adventure.*

## About

Voxterra is a Forge modpack for **Minecraft 1.20.1** that blends technology, exploration, and performance into one immersive experience. Build sprawling factories, conquer challenging dungeons, and explore new realms all while enjoying smoother gameplay and quality of life enhancements.

---

</details>

## Experience

Voxterra delivers a balanced survival experience where **machines power your progress** and **exploration rewards your curiosity**. From deep caverns to floating islands, every adventure feels new and every invention pushes your world further.

---

## 🖥️ **Server Installation**

<details>  
<summary>📘 Click to Expand</summary>  

1. Download the **server pack** (or copy the `mods/` folder from the client).
2. Install **Forge 1.20.1** on your server.
3. Place all required mods into the server’s `mods/` folder.
4. **Remove any client-only mods** (see list below). These will cause console errors like `Mod X is client-side only`.
5. Start the server and check the logs carefully.
6. If it crashes, the logs will show which mod is incompatible. Remove it and restart.
7. Once stable, share the **matching client pack** with your players.

### ❌ Known Client-Only Mods (Remove on Server)

* Oculus (shader loader)
* BSL Shaders
* Rethinking Voxels Shaderpack
* Just Zoom
* Sound Physics Remastered

> ⚠️ Always double-check logs: some updates may add or remove client-only features.

</details>
